proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher age_years lowers objective_response.
Higher ecog_ps lowers objective_response.
tp53_mutation lowers objective_response.
complex_karyotype lowers objective_response.
npm1_mutation raises objective_response.
secondary_aml lowers objective_response.
unfit_for_intensive lowers objective_response.
sex_female associates with objective_response.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within flt3_itd-positive patients, receipt of treatment_midostaurin is associated with a higher objective_response rate than no receipt of treatment_midostaurin.
Within flt3_tkd-positive patients, receipt of treatment_midostaurin is associated with a higher objective_response rate than no receipt of treatment_midostaurin.
Within flt3_itd-positive patients, receipt of treatment_gilteritinib is associated with a higher objective_response rate than no receipt of treatment_gilteritinib.
Within flt3_tkd-positive patients, receipt of treatment_gilteritinib is associated with a higher objective_response rate than no receipt of treatment_gilteritinib.
Within idh1_mutation-positive patients, receipt of treatment_ivosidenib is associated with a higher objective_response rate than no receipt of treatment_ivosidenib.
Within idh2_mutation-positive patients, receipt of treatment_enasidenib is associated with a higher objective_response rate than no receipt of treatment_enasidenib.

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a positive treatment_midostaurin x flt3_itd interaction on objective_response (effect of treatment_midostaurin larger in flt3_itd+).
There is a positive treatment_midostaurin x flt3_tkd interaction on objective_response (effect of treatment_midostaurin larger in flt3_tkd+).
There is a positive treatment_gilteritinib x flt3_itd interaction on objective_response (effect of treatment_gilteritinib larger in flt3_itd+).
There is a positive treatment_gilteritinib x flt3_tkd interaction on objective_response (effect of treatment_gilteritinib larger in flt3_tkd+).
There is a positive treatment_ivosidenib x idh1_mutation interaction on objective_response (effect of treatment_ivosidenib larger in idh1_mutation+).
There is a positive treatment_enasidenib x idh2_mutation interaction on objective_response (effect of treatment_enasidenib larger in idh2_mutation+).

proposed_hypotheses.text: In patients who are unfit_for_intensive==1 AND npm1_mutation==1, treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine markedly increases objective_response.
In patients who are unfit_for_intensive==1 AND npm1_mutation==1 AND tp53_mutation==0 AND complex_karyotype==0, treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine markedly increases objective_response.
Outside the unfit & npm1+ subgroup, treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine provides no objective_response benefit.
In TP53-mutated patients, treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine does NOT increase objective_response (TP53 suppresses ven/aza benefit).
In complex_karyotype+ patients, treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine does NOT increase objective_response.

There is a treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine x treatment_ivosidenib interaction on objective_response (combination differs from sum of individual effects).
There is a treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine x treatment_enasidenib interaction on objective_response (combination differs from sum of individual effects).
There is a treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine x treatment_7plus3 interaction on objective_response (combination differs from sum of individual effects).

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a positive 3-way interaction treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine x npm1_mutation x unfit_for_intensive on objective_response.
Negative 3-way interaction treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine x npm1_mutation x tp53_mutation on objective_response (TP53 wipes out NPM1+ benefit).

Define S = (unfit_for_intensive==1 & npm1_mutation==1 & tp53_mutation==0 & complex_karyotype==0). In an adjusted logistic regression, treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine interacts positively with S on objective_response.
Within S=1, adjusted treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine effect on objective_response is positive.
Within S=0, adjusted treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine effect on objective_response is null.
Treatment-effect heterogeneity scan: treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine x npm1_mutation interaction on objective_response.
Treatment-effect heterogeneity scan: treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine x unfit_for_intensive interaction on objective_response.
Treatment-effect heterogeneity scan: treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine x tp53_mutation interaction on objective_response.
Treatment-effect heterogeneity scan: treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine x complex_karyotype interaction on objective_response.
Treatment-effect heterogeneity scan: treatment_enasidenib x sex_female interaction on objective_response.
Treatment-effect heterogeneity scan: treatment_7plus3 x complex_karyotype interaction on objective_response.
Treatment-effect heterogeneity scan: treatment_ivosidenib x npm1_mutation interaction on objective_response.
Treatment-effect heterogeneity scan: treatment_enasidenib x unfit_for_intensive interaction on objective_response.
Treatment-effect heterogeneity scan: treatment_gilteritinib x unfit_for_intensive interaction on objective_response.
Treatment-effect heterogeneity scan: treatment_ivosidenib x unfit_for_intensive interaction on objective_response.

FINAL: treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine increases objective_response in patients with unfit_for_intensive==1 AND npm1_mutation==1 AND tp53_mutation==0 AND complex_karyotype==0 (and provides essentially no benefit outside this subgroup).

FINAL: treatment_7plus3 has no clinically meaningful effect on objective_response in any subgroup tested; the only consistent signal is a small detrimental association in complex_karyotype==1 patients.
FINAL: treatment_midostaurin does NOT meaningfully change objective_response, even in the flt3_itd+ subgroup.
FINAL: treatment_gilteritinib does NOT meaningfully change objective_response, even in the flt3_itd+ subgroup.
FINAL: treatment_ivosidenib does NOT meaningfully change objective_response, even in the idh1_mutation+ subgroup.
FINAL: treatment_enasidenib does NOT meaningfully change objective_response, even in the idh2_mutation+ subgroup.
